name: Chewy Granola Bars # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Mix all ingredients (except chocolate chips) with a fork until moistened. The mixture will be crumbly.
3. Stir in the chocolate chips.
4. Press the mixture evenly into an ungreased rectangular pan, 13x9x2 inches.
5. Bake until the center is set, about 15-17 minutes.
6. Cut into bars while warm, approximately 3 x 1-1/2 inches each.
7. Makes 27 bars.
